scripts.benchmark:all: npm run benchmark && npm run benchmark:captured
scripts.benchmark:gate: npm run benchmark:all && npm run validate:benchmark-coverage
scripts.captured:autopilot-pack: npm run generate:captured-review-decisions && npm run promote:captured-clips:with-review-decisions && npm run generate:benchmark-coverage && npm run generate:captured-benchmark-plan && npm run generate:captured-specialist-review-kit && npm run generate:captured-capture-slots
scripts.test:community:unit: npx vitest run src/ci/community-workflow.test.ts src/types/community.test.ts src/core/community-post-snapshot.test.ts src/core/community-feed.test.ts src/core/community-discovery-view-model.test.ts src/core/community-public-profile-view-model.test.ts src/core/community-trust-signals.test.ts src/core/community-highlights.test.ts src/core/community-moderation.test.ts src/core/community-creator-metrics.test.ts src/core/community-progression.test.ts src/core/community-spray-mastery.test.ts src/core/community-squads.test.ts src/core/community-rewards.test.ts src/lib/community-access.test.ts src/lib/community-entitlements.test.ts src/actions/community-posts.test.ts src/actions/community-copy.test.ts src/actions/community-profiles.test.ts src/actions/community-likes.test.ts src/actions/community-saves.test.ts src/actions/community-comments.test.ts src/actions/community-follows.test.ts src/actions/community-squads.test.ts src/actions/community-rewards.test.ts src/actions/community-reports.test.ts src/actions/community-admin.test.ts src/actions/community-rate-limit.test.ts src/app/community/metadata.test.ts src/app/community/page.contract.test.ts src/app/community/community-visual-contract.test.ts src/app/community/users/[slug]/page.contract.test.ts src/app/community/[slug]/page.contract.test.ts src/app/community/[slug]/page.test.tsx
scripts.test:community:e2e: npx playwright test e2e/community.publish-entry.spec.ts e2e/community.publish.spec.ts e2e/community.feed.spec.ts e2e/community.comments.spec.ts e2e/community.admin.spec.ts
scripts.verify:community: npm run typecheck && npm run test:community:unit && npm run build && npm run test:community:e2e && npm run test:community:visual
scripts.verify:release: npm run typecheck && npx vitest run && npm run benchmark:gate && npm run build && npm run smoke:local
scripts.test:monetization: npx vitest run src/lib/product-entitlements.test.ts src/lib/product-price-catalog.test.ts src/lib/monetization-flags.test.ts src/lib/quota-ledger.test.ts src/lib/premium-projection.test.ts src/lib/product-analytics.test.ts src/lib/beta-cohorts.test.ts src/actions/history.test.ts src/actions/dashboard.test.ts src/actions/billing.test.ts src/actions/admin-billing.test.ts src/app/api/stripe/webhook/route.test.ts src/server/billing/stripe-fulfillment.test.ts src/server/billing/subscription-state.test.ts src/app/pricing/page.contract.test.ts src/app/billing/page.contract.test.ts src/app/checkout/success/page.contract.test.ts src/app/checkout/cancel/page.contract.test.ts src/app/admin/billing/page.contract.test.ts src/app/analyze/results-dashboard.contract.test.ts src/app/analyze/results-dashboard-view-model.test.ts src/app/dashboard/page.contract.test.ts src/app/history/page.contract.test.ts src/app/community/page.contract.test.ts src/app/copy-claims.contract.test.ts src/ui/components/header.contract.test.tsx
